steps.text: Picking up an automated beacon, very old. It repeats: 'Still here. Still lit. Come by if you're passing.' Signal source: unclear. Tone: friendly.
The beacon noticed our approach vector. New message: 'You're the first in {n:40-4000} days. I'll put the kettle on.' Captain, I believe it's a lighthouse. For roads.
We've passed the beacon's point of closest approach. Final message: 'Safe travels. Tell someone about me.' ...Logging it in the ship's chart, Captain. Permanently. Someone will always know.
